name: email
description: Manage your emails — inbox listing, triage, and prioritization

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: Retrieves all emails from the user's inbox with sender, subject, date, and priority flag. Use when the user asks to 'check email', 'show my inbox', 'what emails do I have', or 'any new messages'. Do NOT call this tool if emails were already retrieved earlier in this conversation — instead, refer to the previous results to answer follow-up questions like 'how many', 'who sent', or 'which one'. Only call again if the user explicitly asks to refresh or re-check.

max_results.description: Maximum number of emails to return. Default is 5.

tools.name: triage_email
tools.description: Analyzes and categorizes emails by urgency, returning a prioritized summary with P1/P2/P3 labels. Use when the user asks 'what needs attention', 'what's urgent', 'prioritize my inbox', or 'what should I handle first'. Returns urgency level, sender, subject, and recommended action for each email. Do NOT use for simply listing emails — use list_emails instead. Do NOT use if triage results were already returned earlier — refer to previous results for follow-up questions about priority or urgency.
examples: what should I respond to first
